infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeNepalApp uses your location to show nearby help.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeNepalApp needs background location for emergency tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Safe Nepal needs access to your photos to let you update your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Safe Nepal needs camera access to report disaster evidence in real-time.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Safe Nepal requires FaceID to verify Responder identity and secure Police Mode.

plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Safe Nepal to monitor high-risk zones even when the app is closed.
